name: Buxton Resources Limited
summary: Buxton Resources Limited engages in the acquisition, exploration, and evaluation of mining tenements in Australia. It holds interests in the Merlin, Fraser, and West Kimberley nickel-copper projects; Yalbra graphite project; Goldmember gold project; and Zanthus iron project located in Western Australia. The company was incorporated in 2007 and is based in Subiaco, Australia.
